experience.title: Scientific and Technologic Officer
experience.company: Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II
experience.description: Providing comprehensive technical and scientific support for research activities within the Department of Agricultural Sciences, managing laboratory instrumentation, and developing data analysis solutions.
achievements: Established and maintained IoT sensor networks for precision agriculture research across multiple experimental sites
Developed automated data pipelines reducing analysis time by 60% for routine soil and plant characterisation
Implemented laboratory information management system serving 4 analytical laboratories
Coordinated technical aspects of 8 funded research projects (Horizon Europe, PRIN, PSR)
Trained 25+ PhD students and researchers on analytical instrumentation and data analysis methods

experience.title: Research Fellow
experience.company: Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II
experience.description: Conducted research on soil quality assessment and sustainable agricultural practices, with a focus on developing rapid analytical methods using spectroscopic techniques.
achievements: Led development of chemometric models for soil carbon prediction using mid-infrared spectroscopy
Co-authored 6 peer-reviewed publications in high-impact journals
Presented research at 4 international conferences including EGU and Eurosoil
Contributed to successful grant applications totalling €450,000

experience.title: PhD Researcher
experience.company: Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II
experience.description: Doctoral research focused on advanced analytical techniques for soil quality monitoring in Mediterranean agroecosystems.
achievements: Completed PhD thesis on spectroscopic methods for soil organic matter characterisation
Developed novel sample preparation protocols adopted by the department's soil laboratory
Visiting researcher at Wageningen University (3 months) for advanced chemometrics training
Recipient of departmental award for best PhD thesis

experience.title: MSc in Environmental Engineering
experience.company: Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II
experience.description: Master's degree programme in Environmental Engineering, with specialisation in waste water management.
achievements: Thesis on soil erosion assessment using GIS and remote sensing
Erasmus exchange at University of Copenhagen, Department of Plant and Environmental Sciences
